name: feature.campaign-intel.nodes
description: Campaign Intelligence node pack (ADR 0160 / ADR 0014) — `budget-optimize` (heuristic marginal-ROAS reallocation over the performance store, plus an optional ctx.callAI scenario narrative) and `forecast` (creative-fatigue detection + outcome projection). Over ctx.features['campaign-intel']. The natural-language analysis the Campaign Intelligence Analyst calls.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Intel: Budget Optimize
nodes.description: Recommends budget reallocations (shift spend toward higher ROAS) over the performance store, with an optional AI scenario narrative. Inputs: { orgId, campaignId?, narrate?, provider?, model? }. Output: { recommendation, narrative? }.

nodes.label: Intel: Forecast
nodes.description: Per-campaign creative-fatigue detection + outcome projection over the performance store. Inputs: { orgId, campaignId? }. Output: { forecasts }.
